name: Unichat
description: A platform for university workflows — messaging, course material delivery, and student-facing learning flows. Multi-tenant, role-based access, real-time updates.

name: Vertex for BCS
description: Reconstructed exam-prep platform for BCS aspirants. Question banks, mock tests with timed scoring, performance analytics, and a content-management backend.

name: Universal SPA
description: A Laravel package that gives any Laravel app SPA-style routing & navigation without rewriting the frontend. Designed to be added with one Composer install.

name: PGBrowser
description: A lightweight web UI for browsing PostgreSQL databases. Schema view, table browsing, query runner — single-file PHP, no frameworks.

name: Jarir's Music Station
description: Reconstructed personal music station — playlists, player UI, smooth transitions. Built for the joy of building.

name: DVWA Resurrection — Pentest Playground
tagline: Vulnerable web app for hands-on pentesting practice
description: A reconstructed DVWA-style playground for practicing OWASP Top 10 attacks: SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, command injection, broken auth. Intentionally vulnerable — runs locally for training only.
